content.text:
VERIFIED.

All 11 files updated:

- **`src/errors.js`** (new) — `AppError extends Error` with `.name`, `.code`, `.message` set correctly
- **9 modules** — each imports `AppError` and uses `throw new AppError('CODE', 'human text')` with the code and message split at the first `: `
- **`src/index.js`** — spreads `./errors.js` so `AppError` is re-exported alongside existing exports
- No `new Error(` remains anywhere in `src/` (confirmed by grep); success-path behavior is unchanged (confirmed by Node smoke test)

result:
VERIFIED.

All 11 files updated:

- **`src/errors.js`** (new) — `AppError extends Error` with `.name`, `.code`, `.message` set correctly
- **9 modules** — each imports `AppError` and uses `throw new AppError('CODE', 'human text')` with the code and message split at the first `: `
- **`src/index.js`** — spreads `./errors.js` so `AppError` is re-exported alongside existing exports
- No `new Error(` remains anywhere in `src/` (confirmed by grep); success-path behavior is unchanged (confirmed by Node smoke test)
